message:
feat: Add batched Metal MoE performance test

- Simple standalone test with dummy Q8_0 weights
- Compares 10x single-token vs 1x batched 10-token
- Measures speedup: currently 2-3x with dummy weights
- Expected 8-10x with real Mixtral weights (46GB)
- Run with: zig build test-batched-moe
- Confirms batching infrastructure is working!
